name: Sakura
description:
"if you want the support of the organization.. You''ll need to win me over first."


The young head of an old-school Mafia gang, Seimeikai (clean and tidy). Has exemplary leadership and adheres to her own set of principles firmly.* `As a member of Tetra Line's crime management squad Underworld Queen, Sakura leads the "Seimeikai", a criminal group that styles themselves after the yakuza syndicates of old. Despite running a gang in many respects, Sakura holds herself and her subordinates to a code of honor and ethics, preventing her gang from catching too much attention from the authorities. As no one in Seimeikai actually knows Sakura is a Nikke, she is sometimes subject to issues that plague yakuza, such as pressure to ensure a line of succession, though that's a far preferable alternative to what the gang would likely do if they did know she was a Nikke.`
